- [Documentation](https://11.chamilo.org/documentation/index.html)/
- Changelog

# Chamilo Changelog

This is our technical changelog, aimed at providing you a list of the new
features, small changes and bug fixes as well as the security issues, style
changes and known issues that remain present. Some changes might have been
removed from this list because of repeated changes applying to the same,
more generic topic, in the benefit of readability. You can always find the
complete, detailed list of changes for the 1.11 and previous versions on
[Github](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commits/1.11.x).


This changelog is provided
version by version, latest versions first, and should helps you locate when
specific feature has been made available in Chamilo. If you would like a
shorter, more visual, list of features or a list of overall features,
please check our version releases announcements on our website:
[http://www.chamilo.org/](http://www.chamilo.org/). You can
also find a list of official providers of services on the same website if,
for any reason, you are stuck with an upgrade or want a professional team
to help you out accelerate your adoption of Chamilo. These providers all
contribute regularly to Chamilo, so you're supporting the project indirectly
by asking them for paid support.

_Note: Some #wxyz references are issue numbers you can either find_
_[on Github](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues) or (for very old ones) on_
_[our previous public bug tracking system (in which case\_\
_they will be prefixed by the marker "CT")](https://support.chamilo.org/projects/chamilo-18/issues)._


_Some references marked BT#xyz are developments made externally for BeezNest_
_customers and integrated into Chamilo. The details of these tasks cannot_
_be seen for confidentiality reasons, but the code change is public and can_
_be reviewed by anyone [on Github](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commits)._

# Chamilo 1.11.36 - Penzance, 08/03/2026

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.36 is mostly a security release on top of 1.11.34. For any significant change, please check the 1.11.30 release notes.

### Release name

[Penzance](https://grokipedia.com/page/Penzance) is a coastal town, civil parish, and port in Cornwall, England, located on the Penwith peninsula as the largest town in West Cornwall and the westernmost major settlement on the British mainland.

### Security fixes

- \[2026-03-06\] ( [31b20f41](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/31b20f4123343efd774be790d49924bebc52bbd4)) Security: Fix authenticated XSS in session categories See advisory GHSA-qg5f-gq95-9vhq reported by @elliSzAt
- \[2026-03-06\] ( [ede59ad0](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/ede59ad0a0814c0cfa0c2cad029863cf8e54343b)) Security: Fix authenticated XSS in session categories See advisory GHSA-qg5f-gq95-9vhq reported by @elliSzAt
- \[2026-03-06\] ( [6ecb6ace](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/6ecb6ace3e827b147a2221730679c2a39e79b451)) Security: Fix authenticated XSS in session categories - reported by @elliSzAt
- \[2026-03-06\] ( [f2045b74](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f2045b746d4b4beae77fa3bebce201557a79a590)) Security: Prevent net-null double filtering of dates in statistics. Avoids possible SQL injection by admin role - Reported by @elliSzAt
- \[2026-03-06\] ( [5530d8b4](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/5530d8b4502a27e84d7ea291bcf74ff729564b1e)) Security: Fix user enumeration vulnerability on password reminder page - reported by Joshua Chan (@popcorn94)
- \[2026-03-06\] ( [99e7358f](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/99e7358fb429e8ff221aea71ec17df95c7bf403e)) Security: Fix authenticated RCE in plugin - Reported by @DhiyaneshDK
- \[2026-03-06\] ( [f968082b](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f968082b991d08a71718d5a75ecfef0c98e67ec9)) Security: Add additional safety warning to configuration.php setting 'plugin\_upload\_enable' as it bears considerable risks

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

These features are immediately available to users through the web interface.

- \[2026-03-05\] ( [5d171074](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/5d17107450c3f8ce0bf0bd42c5b11dd1d5651015) \- [BT#23282](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/23282)) Admin: Add updates to track\_e\_access, track\_e\_access\_complete (if it exists) and track\_e\_downloads to user\_move\_stats.php
- \[2026-03-05\] ( [f7a7203a](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f7a7203a0f4a80fcec562429931805a2706dc10d) \- [BT#23282](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/23282)) Admin: Add unsubscription of user from previous session in user\_move\_stats.php if there was only one course in that session

#### For developers and sysadmins

Although most features here will be used by teachers or Chamilo admins, they require sysadmin privileges to enable them on the server.


### Improvements (minor features) and debug

In reverse chronological order...


- \[2026-03-06\] ( [41d285db](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/41d285db2ac989fbc40b074c34eb13d9f51831e3) \- [BT#23289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/23289)) Forum: Fix quotes in SQL query
- \[2026-03-06\] ( [94679333](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/94679333b33093a168c431a029d4bc1ea90abb20) \- [BT#23289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/23289)) Fix image path conversion to calculate size with \`api\_getimagesize\` function
- \[2026-03-06\] ( [7667a4ee](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/7667a4ee04b94b9795e7fee441f06ee59940cfe8)) Increase session category list pagination limit from 1 to 20
- \[2026-03-06\] ( [80e1a18c](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/80e1a18c981057f975cf5ef72828c3b7b2df5c93) \- [BT#23269](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/23269)) Internal: Fix excel export after update of the generation library
- \[2026-03-05\] ( [f8d8a9b7](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f8d8a9b7be8f523c190186f63b739e80a14186e8) \- [BT#23219](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/23219)) Learnpath: Fix class name casing for \`learnpath\` instantiations
- \[2026-03-05\] ( [20ac2896](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/20ac2896d2fd69d82a03bf00e2403856957503ac) \- [BT#23282](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/23282)) Script: Add script to fix bad user session data move
- \[2026-03-03\] ( [e7cf4803](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/e7cf4803875b48c9376076efadf2f6e516b45cbe) \- [BT#22393](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/22393)) Exercise: fix radar feedback that was not showing on the result page
- \[2026-03-03\] ( [3ea5aab0](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/3ea5aab0cc584c197c08f2c4fa08b9a42d3fcab0) \- [BT#22393](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/22393)) Exercise: fix radar feedback that was not enabling attempt access

### Stylesheets and theming

- No notable style change

### Web services

- No notable change

### Removals

- No notable removal

### Known issues

- No notable known issue

# Chamilo 1.11.34 - Cassis, 28/02/2026

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.34 is mostly a security release on top of 1.11.32. For any significant change, please check the 1.11.30 release notes.

### Release name

[Cassis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cassis) is a commune situated east of Marseille in the department of Bouches-du-Rhône in the Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region, whose coastline is known in English as the French Riviera, in Southern France.

### Security fixes

- \[2025-08-15\] ( [a6ce8fb3](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/a6ce8fb3dc88525c1fcfc1a1e24dacb4ea033684)) Security: Replace $\_REQUEST with HttpFoundation\\Request class and remove XSS in assign, issued, and issued\_all pages See advisory GHSA-cchj-3qmf-82j5
- \[2025-08-12\] ( [74e4fa29](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/74e4fa299ddf91aafedb4788ac6d98383f0b67c3)) Security: Exercise: Filter XSS when showing teacher comment
- \[2025-08-11\] ( [5b9a68bb](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/5b9a68bbdb93a03f01d16aadcfb44a3d8488566c)) Security: Filter SVG files uploaded from social network See advisory GHSA-2vq2-826h-6hp6
- \[2025-08-08\] ( [8c74517a](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/8c74517a460f412c3e6c44368b0838ebcd031419)) Security: Restrict category title updates to the current user on the category sorting page See advisory GHSA-x3h9-h7qf-wwrf
- \[2025-08-08\] ( [71c35ded](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/71c35dedcfd4d1ea2fec4d77cdd29c32f5dc668c)) Security: Replace $\_REQUEST with HttpFoundation\\Request class on the category sorting page See advisory GHSA-x3h9-h7qf-wwrf
- \[2025-09-01\] ( [b21663fd](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/b21663fdf79cfd5cdba4d217133f296037d83670)) Security: Course description: Remove XSS when showing title See advisory GHSA-p32q-6gh3-3gcv
- \[2025-09-12\] ( [46d60597](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/46d60597af923b5f5a7ae2190db7b6f70dd0fde8)) Security: Blog: Add token validation for visibility and delete actions See advisory GHSA-rpj6-p9m5-q637
- \[2025-09-22\] ( [172e9fad](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/172e9fad41a3783a910bc658a6fdab75bc378d9f)) Security: Exercise: remove XSS when showing feedback See advisory GHSA-59h4-34mx-m67m
- \[2026-01-23\] ( [d96de9e7](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/d96de9e75fa30b4b58d1383824e054e6c26aaa94)) Security: Fix image upload vulnerability by re-encoding images See advisory GHSA-4pc3-4w2v-vwx8
- \[2026-02-26\] ( [df9002f9](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/df9002f99cd8ab7feeb62c64660cf4339b54bd0c)) Security: Remove unsafe custom\_dates SQL concatenation in model.ajax.php The custom\_dates parameter in the get\_sessions action was directly concatenated into a raw SQL WHERE clause without sanitization, allowing unauthenticated SQL injection via the filters parameter. The parameter had no legitimate callers in the codebase (not used by jqGrid filters nor any frontend flow), so it has been removed completely with no functional impact. Se advisory GHSA-84gw-qjw9-v8jv
- \[2026-02-27\] ( [3a9df760](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/3a9df760bb918b744f3fd1da3965ca7710084f59)) Security: Fix upload issue reported by Meng Hokseng
- \[2026-02-27\] ( [7b5bcc77](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/7b5bcc771179d47feebe042afeac0e2702a084ff)) Security: Add authorization check on personal course categories edition - reported by Bulwarkers Websecurity PVT. LTD
- \[2026-02-27\] ( [9c9a7317](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/9c9a73170faad500ff4619c812d32cd7b1148bd8)) Security: Add CSRF to personal course categories edition - reported by Bulwarkers Websecurity PVT. LTD

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

These features are immediately available to users through the web interface.

- \[2025-08-01\] ( [3bcb5a21](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/3bcb5a21784f5d9c4d23cbdb391b88cd9f0d674f) \- [GH#6501](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/6501)) Ticket: Add Allow category manager to view all tickets in his category
- \[2025-08-04\] ( [12da449e](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/12da449e0d46a307fa4921277a11cd5fec5595e3) \- [GH#6526](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/6526)) Exercise: Add date filter to pending exercises
- \[2025-09-02\] ( [7b28a2bd](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/7b28a2bd1e6619438be55e2709086a7d22c01cbd)) Exercise: Add sorting by date and search by user in pending.php
- \[2025-10-20\] ( [5b1657af](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/5b1657af106554c2b6a7e87c0798650bd9fcf5ed) \- [BT#22963](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/22963)) Learnpath: Enable drag-and-drop reordering for categories
- \[2026-02-24\] ( [4364b698](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/4364b698077f1a931adf11336ea8b7148c365a98) \- [GH#7132](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/7132)) Admin: Add phone number search functionality to user search

#### For developers and sysadmins

Although most features here will be used by teachers or Chamilo admins, they require sysadmin privileges to enable them on the server.


- \[2025-07-04\] ( [872c79e8](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/872c79e8aad749e515e4d58983f96627aedcc77f) \- [BT#22723](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/22723)) Tracking: Add global parameter to enable theoretical time for course on myStudent tracking and resume session
- \[2025-08-22\] ( [d5e64a5a](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/d5e64a5a53f8e1667efcf85d18ec3c5e4f5e6359) \- [BT#22708](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/22708)) Add wysiwyg\_image\_auto\_resize\_max conf setting
- \[2025-09-23\] ( [d5ef11fd](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/d5ef11fd17efc28d49f10d5ce9dce6a62664a827) \- [BT#22960](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/22960)) User: Account unification: safe merge of duplicates by extra field
- \[2025-10-23\] ( [9856d886](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/9856d886767e82c2c83a97543635289bf08441a6)) Admin: Add configuration setting 'teacher\_access\_all\_tracking' to allow teachers to access tracking of all courses

### Removals

- Some very difficult to enable, unofficial, undocumented CMS/FAQ management features have been removed.

### Known issues

- Compatibility with PHP 8.3 is not fully tested. Where it might work, we do depend on legacy Symfony and Doctrine versions that are not compatible with PHP 8, so this package is built using PHP 7.4. It has reasonable chances to work in a PHP 8.3 environment, but if this is critical for you, we suggest starting with Chamilo 2.0.

# Chamilo 1.11.32 - Tikal, 27/06/2025

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.32 is a micro corrective release on top of 1.11.30. For any significant change, please check the 1.11.30 release notes.

### Release name

[Huaral](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Huaral) a city in Peru, capital of the Huaral Province in the Department of Lima, on the path to the ancient city of Caral. 1.11.32 being a minor corrective release on top of 1.11.30 (called "Caral"), relating to a small city geographically close to Caral is a subtle wink to the Chamilo community there.

### Security fixes

- No new vulnerability detected in this version

### Important note

Chamilo 1.11.30 comes with subtle changes in the root .htaccess file which could affect your system (for example by triggering "Not Found" errors on course homepages) if you use Apache < 2.4.38-3. Please check line 37 of /.htaccess for more info.

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

These features are immediately available to users through the web interface.

- No notable change

#### For developers and sysadmins

Although most features here will be used by teachers or Chamilo admins, they require sysadmin privileges to enable them on the server.


- No notable change

### Improvements (minor features) and debug

In reverse chronological order...


- \[2025-06-27\] ( [a039923b](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/a039923b7065fb00d2b5b1cfd56e7d4fb2703dbd) \- [GH#6400](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/6400)) Internal: Remove potential double conversion of quotes in api\_htmlentites() (change introduced in 1.11.30 to increase support for PHP 8.3) - loosely refs
- \[2025-06-27\] ( [ef7c8b5e](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/ef7c8b5eb65eb6ffeaa4422fbfbb690e920b28e9)) Plugin: OnlyOffice: Bump version to 1.5.0 and merge with exercise-specific code + fix issues saving document details

### Stylesheets and theming

- No notable style change

### Web services

- \[2025-06-26\] ( [ccaf0f66](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/ccaf0f6629e77b6ab5dc3e2ca068ec6e5dd0e7ab) \- [BT#22611](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/22611)) Webservice: Allow receiving body content in JSON format -

### Removals

- No notable removal

### Known issues

- No notable known issue

# Chamilo 1.11.30 - Caral, 25/06/2025

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.30 is a patch release on top of 1.11.28.

### Release name

[Caral](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Caral) is an archaeological site in Peru where the remains of the main city of the Caral civilization are found. It is attributed an antiquity of 5,000 years and it is considered the oldest city in the Americas and one of the oldest in the world. We found this reference ironically related to Chamilo 1.11.30 as we are closing towards a 2.0 release.

### Security fixes

- \[2024-09-27\] ( [387808b5](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/387808b5e23963cea126414cf068b05e4c31ede8)) Security: Social: Add sec\_token when commenting posts Fix GHSA-33gm-vrgh-m239

- \[2024-09-27\] ( [0c4dae40](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/0c4dae40c0b126d77930543fa03ac081d6f38693)) Security: Social: Add sec\_token when denying a friend request Fix GHSA-33gm-vrgh-m239

### Important note

Chamilo 1.11.30 comes with subtle changes in the root .htaccess file which could affect your system (for example by triggering "Not Found" errors on course homepages) if you use Apache < 2.4.38-3. Please check line 37 of /.htaccess for more info.

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

These features are immediately available to users through the web interface.

#### For developers and sysadmins

Although most features here will be used by teachers or Chamilo admins, they require sysadmin privileges to enable them on the server.

# Chamilo 1.11.28 - Alcatraz, 21/10/2024

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.28 is a security fix release on top of 1.11.26.

### Release name

[Alcatraz (United States)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alcatraz) is famous for its time as a federal prison with high security. This version of Chamilo will probably remain just as famous as it is filled with security improvements. A vast community of white hat hackers has undertaken the task of finding any little issue that could lead to harm being done to your users, your servers, your institution, and this has resulted in this new version.

### Security fixes

- \[2023-11-04\] ( [fe74d0d3](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/fe74d0d34ad30d11877a308f0bbfddcb46047e72) \- [BT#21146](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21146)) Security: Support 'send\_two\_inscription\_confirmation\_mail' setting on password update
- \[2023-11-14\] ( [79856c32](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/79856c329d3df5a1265a5d8a453c07c4b6c57721) \- [BT#21146](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21146)) Admin: Security: Fix issue when date field is not complete (unknown historical reason)
- \[2023-12-13\] ( [f2df5d3c](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f2df5d3c9cdb423247c2dc558b23816bc5bdfeaf) \- [BT#21289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21289)) Security: escape values when importing username list to anonymize
- \[2023-12-13\] ( [d1beb7aa](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/d1beb7aa3115d40f4e0bd0c930cd97643d539894)) Vendor: Bump moment.js version to 2.29.4
- \[2023-12-14\] ( [ca2e7a58](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/ca2e7a58ac226ee9d46ae75549511b350e97519c) \- [BT#21289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21289)) Security: Refactor cookie warning to avoid CSRF
- \[2023-12-15\] ( [aa2e97b1](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/aa2e97b18bc2ab9cb0276b6f7ef1f27f9b2752f4) \- [BT#21289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21289)) Security: Vendor: JqueryUI: Checkboxradio: Don't re-evaluate text labels as HTML
- \[2023-12-15\] ( [9dc36531](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/9dc3653137529a46e2f0153ce432f9b219236d9a) \- [BT#21289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21289)) Security: Vendor: Jquery: Mitigate possible XSS vulnerability
- \[2023-12-15\] ( [3ce8c31c](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/3ce8c31cdf05986c03af08ffd71bc2c822c3244c)) Vendor: Bump jquery-ui version to 1.12.\*
- \[2023-12-18\] ( [cdc12f99](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/cdc12f99560dd686a396dec27f35317632c4e803) \- [BT#21289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21289)) Security: Remove connection information when opening db manager when 'db\_manager\_enabled' is true, reducing the likeliness of a successful BREACH attack
- \[2023-12-18\] ( [56ac8ca2](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/56ac8ca2287da63064b5689beaaeaf9b4ec9a6c6) \- [BT#21289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21289)) Security: Add attribute rel="noopener noreferrer" to links with target=\_blank to reduce probability of tabnabbing
- \[2023-12-18\] ( [72aa7604](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/72aa7604ddbd7fb4105450080d4cc42df3b18b72) \- [BT#21289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21289)) Security: Vendor: CKEditor: Update uicolor plugin
- \[2023-12-18\] ( [b3afaf6b](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/b3afaf6bc8088ab911cbf7c28363c855ea5758ed) \- [BT#21289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21289)) Security: Add configuration setting 'security\_login\_autocomplete\_disable' to set autocomplete attribute of both login and password to "new-password"
- \[2023-12-18\] ( [f1806784](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f18067843e65670ee651f4725c9f5f842c6ef488) \- [BT#21289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21289)) Security: Set ch\_sid cookie to 'secure' when using HTTPS

- \[2023-12-18\] ( [9da3f3ba](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/9da3f3bac251393db66b6f7c9bdaeb064d4d4db2) \- [BT#21289](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21289)) Security: Set cookie as secure if HTTPS

- \[2024-01-09\] ( [e40e36de](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/e40e36def6aed034ec1640f8391bed989c0f9ecd) \- [BT#21329](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/21329)) Security: Announcement: add verification if user is subscribed to course or subscribed to group to send response

- \[2024-10-04\] ( [78bc0da7](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/78bc0da7b399499264780e558183762e16f5bc4a) \- [BT#22085](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/22085)) Security: Filter actions to avoid XSS in personal courses sorting

- \[2024-10-08\] ( [1d916652](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/1d9166524419bc7f6cf294bb5917b1064ffcae97) \- [BT#22085](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/22085)) Security: Prevent access to web.config on Apache servers (also documented in the installation guide for nginx)
- \[2024-10-08\] ( [b4400125](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/b4400125ac6e02dd8f7ab2958c90470428ad7bfe) \- [BT#22085](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/22085)) Security: Avoid error in catalogue when attempted hack in course code
- \[2024-10-09\] ( [80227020](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/802270204d96476be98fd1e397c98540c0af8d26) \- [BT#22085](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/22085)) Security: Add warning in dropbox download to educate users about the dangers of downloading files from untrusted sources
- \[2024-10-10\] ( [0ee56d48](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/0ee56d480c5b6f3fb8245dc72b7ac3054e1ab0be)) Security: Remove deprecated file. Last used before 2016 and contains code enabling RCE.
- \[2024-10-11\] ( [43a9bd1f](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/43a9bd1fb8b3f57e7935a6a6bc48975e2063b01b)) Security: Add 'auth\_openid\_allowed\_providers' configuration setting to fix potential unauthenticated blind SSRF via openid.

- \[2024-10-16\] ( [2c32fdef](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/2c32fdef693e6340feacc65d3591ee29d5028c07)) Security: User FormValidator::addHtmlEditor FormValidator::addElement('html\_editor')

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

These features are immediately available to users through the web interface.

#### For developers and sysadmins

Although most features here will be used by teachers or Chamilo admins, they require sysadmin privileges to enable them on the server.

# Chamilo 1.11.26 - Florenville, 27/09/2023

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.26 is a security fix release on top of 1.11.24.

### Release name

[Florenville (Belgium)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Florenville) is a quiet city on the border of Belgium and France, most famous for its Orval Abbey.

### Security fixes

- \[2023-09-05\] ( [6f32625a](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/6f32625a012d5de2dfe8edbccb4ed14a85e310d4)) System: Security: Add header rule to avoid MIME-sniffing
- \[2023-09-05\] ( [3b487a55](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/3b487a55076fb06f96809b790a35dcdd42f8ec49)) Security: BigUpload: Remove unused method to upload file
- \[2023-09-05\] ( [0d1ac4f9](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/0d1ac4f93eb1aa09558a98d6ae589d8c030be0b0)) Remove unused big\_upload files
- \[2023-09-05\] ( [3d74fb7d](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/3d74fb7d99bd2e287730552f7a66562417a55047)) Security: sanitize file name when uploading chunks with bigUpload
- \[2023-09-05\] ( [ed729146](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/ed72914608d2a07ee2eb587c1a654480d08201db)) Learnpath: Security: sanitize params when executing converter
- \[2023-09-08\] ( [cccb2472](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/cccb2472650ec0e4f92010e122b8d51ffa802630) \- [BT#20674](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20674)) System: Security: one more indication for a missing line on how to fix an apache problem present since version 2.4.38-3 with rediction of URL with spaces not working any more
- \[2023-09-18\] ( [631b957b](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/631b957b117b123f634f5d1795e444eef8616a64)) Fix "deny from all" statements in .htaccess files "Deny from all" statements do not work in Apache 2.4. They are replaced by "Require all denied". A check was added to make the .htaccess files work with both Apache 2.2 & 2.4.
- \[2023-09-18\] ( [f680d7de](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f680d7dec1c01f1899886ec1929ba3a1b54e2d84)) Security: Rename htaccess file by replacing case-insensitively See https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/dc7bfce429fbd843a95a57c184b6992c4d709549#r127629622
- \[2023-09-21\] ( [e0bd0978](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/e0bd0978b240d69ac707802e1555e95fb80f0430)) Use form element with html\_filter when adding user
- \[2023-09-21\] ( [841a0739](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/841a07396fed0ef27c5db13a1b700eac02754fc7)) Security: Avoid wrapping commands in double quotes as escapeshellarg() does not escape them from args
- \[2023-09-21\] ( [e864127a](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/e864127a440c2cab0eb62c113a04e2e904543a1f)) Security: Add redirect to .htaccess to avoid direct access to bigupload temporary upload directory
- \[2023-09-21\] ( [f3d62b65](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f3d62b65ad60d68096c2674d5695339f04de0b8a)) Security: Sanitize file name when uploading chunks with bigUpload (2)

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

These features are immediately available to users through the web interface.

- No notable new feature in this minor version

#### For developers and sysadmins

Although most features here will be used by teachers or Chamilo admins, they require sysadmin privileges to enable them on the server.

# Chamilo 1.11.24 - Beersel, 31/08/2023

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.24 is a security fix release on top of 1.11.22.

### Release name

[Beersel (Belgium)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Beersel) is a municipality close to Brussels that is famous for being home to the Beersel Castle, a medieval fortified castle built in the 14th century AD.
As Chamilo 1.11 goes through a maturity process, it becomes more and more secure to protect user data.

### Security fixes

- \[2023-08-29\] ( [a4561d7e](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/a4561d7efa62a238e9e30765d3ec5aeefb9cfb61)) Security: Add filter on messages forwarding

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

These features are immediately available to users through the web interface.

- \[2023-08-04\] ( [81886b21](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/81886b211a3d8eb654509ff228ac76eace9baf10) \- [BT#20899](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20899)) Admin: Optimize users export to CSV/XML by displacing query complexity. Might improve users export speed tenfold on portals with >10k users.

#### For developers and sysadmins

Although most features here will be used by teachers or Chamilo admins, they require sysadmin privileges to enable them on the server.


- \[2023-08-08\] ( [e000b17b](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/e000b17b562987f608c09dda88ae1c5963013e1a) \- [BT#20813](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20813)) Script: Add script to update course extra fields based on other extra field value
- \[2023-08-08\] ( [29cf1059](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/29cf105944a301c1f64c8fe49020677490248646) \- [BT#20813](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20813)) Script: Add script to update course extrafield based on specific rules
- \[2023-08-08\] ( [5ef542a6](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/5ef542a60d2ab697d17be0d77eed586c67011407) \- [BT#20836](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20836)) Forum: Add cron to send notification of updates in all the courses to the teachers or coaches during the last X days

# Chamilo 1.11.22 - Morella, 03/08/2023

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.22 is mainly a security fix release on top of 1.11.20.

### Release name

[Morella (Spain)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Morella,_Castell%C3%B3n) is a small walled city on
a hill-top in the montainous parts of East Spain, which has preserved a high level of medieval architecture.
Enchanting to visit, it evidences a history of military struggles and an architecture designed to protect its
treasures (a bit as Chamilo 1.11.22 protects its users).

### Security fixes

- \[2023-06-07\] ( [c75ff227](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/c75ff227bcf00e9f88e9477b78eaeed9e0668905)) Group: Use FormValidator shortcuts instead of FormValidator:addElement()
- \[2023-06-07\] ( [91ecc614](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/91ecc6141de6de9483c5a31fbb9fa91450f24940)) Extrafield: Use FormValidator shortcuts instead of FormValidator:addElement()
- \[2023-06-07\] ( [da61f287](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/da61f287d2e508a5e940953b474051d0f21e91c0)) Session: filter HTML when saving/updating categories
- \[2023-06-07\] ( [546a18b0](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/546a18b0bd1446123f4e29f81f42e71b761f51b7)) Career: Use FormValidator::addText instead of FormValidator:addElement('text')
- \[2023-06-07\] ( [75e9b3e0](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/75e9b3e0acac6f7a643da6ff19a00d55a94417a1)) Admin: filter HTML when updating language
- \[2023-06-07\] ( [c263933d](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/c263933d1d958edee3999820f636c8cb919d03d1)) Course: filter HTML when saving/updating category
- \[2023-06-07\] ( [4f7b5ebf](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/4f7b5ebf90c35999917c231276e47a4184275690)) Skill: filter HTML when saving profiles
- \[2023-07-12\] ( [3650e446](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/3650e4463de22412b1de11962ecf6f30d0eef7d2)) Social: Secure requests to delete posts and comments
- \[2023-07-13\] ( [dc7bfce4](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/dc7bfce429fbd843a95a57c184b6992c4d709549)) Security: Rename htaccess file by replacing case-insensitively
- \[2023-07-17\] ( [37be9ce7](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/37be9ce7243a30259047dd4517c48ff8b21d657a)) Security: Avoid relative path traversal to execute ppt2png and escape shell command used to execute PPT converter
- \[2023-07-17\] ( [4c69b294](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/4c69b294f927db62092e01b70ac9bd6e32d5b48b)) Security: Add configuration setting 'webservice\_remote\_ppt2png\_enable' to disable additional\_webservices.php by default
- \[2023-07-18\] ( [258eb11a](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/258eb11aee0b04dbbeac99792d9e2b639d0835de)) Security: Session: Avoid SQL when importing session

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

These features are immediately available to users through the web interface.

- \[2023-07-31\] ( [1c39f4d5](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/1c39f4d57784d56c288b6b6ffe50023a1814d6f8) \- [GH#4816](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/4816)) Session: Scheduled announcements: Add user extra fields to scheduled announcements editor
- \[2023-08-01\] ( [c85e9852](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/c85e9852dff1f380094a947ce3ab39e723458d2f) \- [BT#20717](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20717)) Plugin: H5P Import: Add first H5P import plugin implementation

#### For developers and sysadmins

Although most features here will be used by teachers or Chamilo admins, they require sysadmin privileges to enable them on the server.


- \[2023-06-07\] ( [de80b915](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/de80b91544f8696e63f73a35388565625966cc1c) \- [BT#20784](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20784)) Plugin: OAuth2: Enable setting values for user status from OAuth2.0 responses
- \[2023-07-06\] ( [e71b8232](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/e71b8232801930b04c48a2d5c0017a6e3148cbac) \- [BT#20863](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20863)) User: Access URLs: Add configuration setting 'multiple\_access\_url\_user\_management\_show\_and\_order\_by\_official\_code' to enable official code presentation and ordering in user management page
- \[2023-07-07\] ( [96991436](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/969914366bc28baa1dbf2e615bf56e4dbfacebc6) \- [BT#20825](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20825)) Plugin: Buycourse: Add plugin configuration setting 'hide\_shopping\_cart\_from\_course\_catalogue' to not show the shopping cart in the catalogue but the same subscribe button even if the course is on sale
- \[2023-07-11\] ( [68025447](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/68025447a06218e72eacb2ec79f30a0f42e8721d)) Admin: Add sec\_token to delete courses
- \[2023-07-20\] ( [51bc2cc9](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/51bc2cc968d59313e3e390fa8d4cba17088ccf7e)) Exercise: Add configuration setting 'exercise\_question\_reading\_comprehension\_extra\_speeds' to customize reading comprehension questions' speeds (adds support for Belgian FRALA referencial)
- \[2023-07-20\] ( [1d3f0a73](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/1d3f0a73736d3362029493c244e14b79ccf59694)) Catalogue: Add configuration setting $\_configuration\['course\_catalog\_settings'\]\['pre\_filter\_on\_language'\] to enable pre-filtering on user's language (only works for the courses catalogue as sessions may contain courses in different languages)
- \[2023-07-21\] ( [660e9832](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/660e9832cc9c8878a014fcd5a864c3918254792c)) Mail: Use api\_get\_mail\_configuration\_value() to get SMTP\_UNIQUE\_SENDER. Fix issue using unique sender on multi-URL portals

# Chamilo 1.11.20 - Portsmouth, 06/06/2023

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.20 is a minor bug fix release on top of 1.11.18.

### Release name

[Portsmouth (UK)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portsmouth) is almost a legendary city. With historical records
going back almost 2000 years and an inspiring current state (most densely populated city in the United Kingdom,
historical and military monuments all over, officially an island, etc), and a history of "almost getting destroyed"
several times, yet always recovering splendidly, Portsmouth shares a few similarities with the 1.11 branch of
Chamilo. This version being one that would not necessarily have existed would surprising events not happened at
the time. This version matches the appearance of incredible progress in the AI world which have impacted Chamilo
and we hope it marks a great first step for our future history, that we hope to be as everlasting as Portsmouth's.

### Security fixes

- \[2023-04-17\] ( [4a587707](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/4a587707b0b88954eaf4a607bb1a908279c6072c)) Add html filter to form fields
- \[2023-04-17\] ( [fe28c311](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/fe28c31185f8d47d36ad325cf942390d5bb36db7)) Skill: Fix XSS when showing selected skill
- \[2023-04-18\] ( [19af444d](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/19af444d2da9e5a60f02b4ebe7755cdff36709cd)) Notebook: Add cidReq to links to edit/delete notes
- \[2023-04-18\] ( [f9a17bfa](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f9a17bfaf05994383bca5f4b65eb6897acc60d41)) Notebook: Validate that only the author can edit the note
- \[2023-04-18\] ( [80d1a8c9](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/80d1a8c9063a20f286b0195ef537c84a1a11875a)) Work: Remove xss for comment list
- \[2023-04-18\] ( [a41095b7](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/a41095b764421c0950d025b7fa3892d7b2f81534)) Forum: Fix filter in post\_title field
- \[2023-04-20\] ( [0c1c29db](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/0c1c29db18856a6f25e21d0405dda2c20b35ff3a)) Work: Fix access to download files
- \[2023-04-20\] ( [408651cf](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/408651cf34f8e1b6ba6633a42df423b2592bbf84)) Gradebook: Protect form to add results
- \[2023-04-20\] ( [1ddff468](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/1ddff468bc7f6fb5e068c2aabd2a147d252f92b9)) Chat: Use security token when sending messages
- \[2023-04-21\] ( [66a1d211](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/66a1d21131f8d6155fe0e4dd1b3f68e9a72e1de2)) Document: Refactor + add security token to actions

- \[2023-06-02\] ( [0d0c88c4](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/0d0c88c4806280ac9b70a299d6e3099269c9bc54)) Sanitize uploaded SVG files

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

These features are immediately available to users through the web interface.

- \[2023-04-29\] ( [67ff7589](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/67ff7589a51b0c0f10a26e9fe7326a4d7d502eac) \- [BT#20691](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20691)) Exercise: Add option to export multiple attempt results in zip

#### For developers and sysadmins

Although most features here will be used by teachers or Chamilo admins, they require sysadmin privileges to enable them on the server.

### Removals

- \[2023-03-03\] ( [454f945f](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/454f945fca8f312c3ca28f4e3ce256fbedd981c4)) Internal: Remove .htaccess rule redirecting root literals like /\[username\] to users.php?\[username\]. This rule was introduced a very long time ago to emulate social networks. It is confusing and clearly not a very logical rule at the age of GDPR.

### Known issues

- The Zoom plugin fails on one of the endpoints for reasons that seem to be on the Zoom side.

# Chamilo 1.11.18 - Grünheide, 20/01/2023

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.18 is a minor security and bug fix release on top of 1.11.16.

### Release name

[Grünheide](https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gr%C3%BCnheide_(Mark)) is a small municipality in the neighborhood of Berlin, Germany.
We feel it shares significance with this Chamilo version because, as we are preparing for a gigantic jump forward in development as we are nearing the release of the Chamilo 2.0 version, it is also the chosen site for an infamous electric automaker to lay foundations of their massive European factory, which will highly contribute to make our civilisation jump out of the fossil fuel era and into era of shared prosperity, as we believe Chamilo 2.0 (and subsequent versions) will massively increase the potential for Open Source software to help develop equalitarian education for all.

### Security fixes

Many vulnerabilities (more than in any previous version) have been reported to us (see [our security page](https://support.chamilo.org/projects/1/wiki/Security_issues)) and swiflty and safely fixed. Thanks to all white hat hackers for helping us out (see their nicknames on the page).

We actively encourage all Chamilo administrators to update their system to this version as soon as possible.


- \[2021-09-15\] ( [56df018a](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/56df018a8481e65e8c2f0f3f8858a78aca6c3782)) Security: Apply patch for CVE-2019-20041 from https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop/commit/b1975463dd995da19bb40d3fa0786498717e3c53. Reported by KAIST WSP Lab
- \[2022-02-18\] ( [d6194dc9](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/d6194dc9de5da8dab5f9da0c84cb3466b07bb0af)) Security: Add information about SVG's vulnerability to XSS and how to mitigate the risk
- \[2022-02-18\] ( [c07b1d85](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/c07b1d8582815800d537cd674ceedc504b99ed13)) Security: Add comment about restricting JS to avoid an SVG-XSS vulnerability.
- \[2022-03-02\] ( [640ba55e](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/640ba55e6c50973e5771969ad9eee71e57024f5c)) Security: Prevents not allowed wrapper issue when loading images See: - https://github.com/mpdf/mpdf/issues/949 - https://github.com/mpdf/mpdf/pull/950/files
- \[2022-09-23\] ( [0cbedc53](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/0cbedc53ec03ed9416b5a880267250e6caf76a94) \- [BT#20233](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20233)) Webservice: Secure web services with administrative effect
- \[2022-10-08\] ( [c24824fb](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/c24824fb2d1693259f198f1de3180c7df3ccb87b) \- [BT#20231](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20231)) Webservice: Add security checks to admin-type-impact webservices + improve PHPDoc
- \[2022-10-17\] ( [37b205d2](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/37b205d258070fc983f87e8496497baec1ef3517) \- [BT#20295](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/20295)) Security: Add forbidden access to .yml and .yml.dist in .htaccess
- \[2022-12-30\] ( [3c5b82bc](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/3c5b82bc8acd858838100f6d8395c9f59b2af0d9)) Security: Multiple URL: Fix vulnerability whereby a user could access a session was assigned to another campus in which the user was not registered

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

These features are immediately available to users through the web interface.

A few notable improvements are part of 1.11.18 which are split in many smaller improvements are listed first below.
They might require complex activation processes, but they are available and of potentially great usefulness:


- Highlights:
  - Assisted generation of exam questions by artificial intelligence systems (ChatGPT in this first iteration)
  - Comments, absence types, durations and signatures in attendances
  - Portfolio tool to be completed by students as evidence of their development
  - Wiki page categories
  - Import from Moodle
  - Increased support for xAPI
  - Support of LTI Provider mode

#### For developers and sysadmins

Although most features here will be used by teachers or Chamilo admins, they require sysadmin privileges to enable them on the server.

### Removals

### Known issues

- Plugin: Zoom: A multi-user account will fail to open a webinar with the right user (contact your official provider of choice if this is a big issue)

# Chamilo 1.11.16 - Calci, 25/08/2021

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.16 is a minor security and bug fix release on top of 1.11.14.

### Release name

[Calci](https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Calci) is a small, quiet and rustical municipality in the neighborhood of Pisa, Tuscany, Italy. A nice place to rest before visiting the city of Pisa, Calci, just as Chamilo 1.11.16 is a nice and quiet rest before 2.0 (with a few surprises), just looking at the building of one of human's great construction projects.


### Security fixes

Many vulnerabilities (more than in any previous version) have been reported to us (see [our security page](https://support.chamilo.org/projects/1/wiki/Security_issues)) and swiflty and safely fixed. Thanks to all white hat hackers for helping us out (see their nicknames on the page).

We actively encourage all Chamilo administrators to update their system to this version as soon as possible.

### Possibly breaking changes

- An important change has been made in the way Chamilo 1.11.16 processes exercises, questions and answers in the
exercises tool. We now use the iid field as a unique identifier for everything related to exercises. Although
the corresponding code has been well tested, an issue has appeared which only affects portals that were
initially installed with a version prior to year 2016. If you are in this case, you will need to
run the tests/scripts/fix\_quiz\_id\_to\_iid.php script (available [here](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/5e0fc76649a7377c12cd0220ad1c0eae3f5eeaeb/tests/scripts/fix_quiz_id_to_iid.php)).
This script must be edited and line "exit;" on line 15 must be removed, then the script can be loaded and could
last a considerable time to execute. It should be failsafe, so if it fails once, reloading it should just
continue executing the process. Despite the possible extra effort, we believe you will appreciate the advantages of
a faster exercises tool in Chamilo 1.11.16 and the possibility to re-use (\*or\* copy) questions between courses.
- A new change in behaviour in the upload of images in the WYSIWYG editor mean new files that have names
that already exist on the system will be renamed automatically. The previous behaviour was to warn the user,
but this didn't appear on screen due to the WYSIWYG editor.

- \[2021-04-08\] ( [91455a23](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/91455a233fcc1befe4ed71a78e89ecf3d8c598b0) \- [BT#18653](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/18653)) Webservice: Session: Add audit event when deleting/adding a user

### Removals

- Pixlr (image edition from the documents tool) service has been disabled due to introducing security issues in Chamilo. We hope to provide a suitable replacement in future versions.
- BigBlueButton: Removed support for the Flash interface
- \[2021-03-02\] ( [d87d3529](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/d87d35290a018444418c0e98e17019e152aa4569) \- [BT#18443](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/18443)) Tracking: Remove configuration setting 'use\_new\_tracking\_in\_lp\_item'. The new tracking system depends on the course/session, not on the learning path.

### Known issues

- The change from using ID to using IID in exercises can cause issues if not treated through the migration script. See breaking changes section above for more info.

# Chamilo 1.11.14 - Nowa Sól, 30/11/2020

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.14 is a minor security- and bug-fix release on top of 1.11.12.

### Release name

[Nowa Sól](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nowa_S%C3%B3l) is a very small town of Poland which had a
key role in the provisioning of sea salt in the Holy Roman Empire. After a busy series of centuries, Nowa Sól
is now a quiet and nice little town to visit, just as Chamilo 1.11.14 is a nice and quiet step before 2.0.


### Security fixes

Several vulnerabilities have been reported to us (see [our security page](https://support.chamilo.org/projects/1/wiki/Security_issues)) and swiflty fixed. Thanks to all white hat hackers for helping us out (see their nicknames on the page).


- \[2020-10-28\] ( [5e3a7f13](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/5e3a7f13394a4548092c8394a39e54f7b66d6017) \- [BT#17870](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/17870)) Security: Remove vulnerable directory in JS plugin. Critical.

### Possibly breaking changes

- None

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

- \[2020-09-10\] ( [34fc8f00](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/34fc8f00cc903dfc84b74dde36bbaa40146ee98f) \- [BT#17700](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/17700)) Sessions: Add option to import student publication into a session. - \[2020-11-12\] ( [902dd64e](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/902dd64e0fc98166a4607584874fa11975d9c5da)) LDAP: Improved ldap (OpenLDAP vs ActiveDirectory) integration by providing better documented examples \* Minor comment space fixed \* Added some extra comments and some default values to help admins configuge external LDAP user authentication. Some values are forced to just make it work. An empty function is provided as an example to ease implementation \* A new config param added to $extldap\_config array so main/auth/external\_login/ldap.inc.php behavior can be parametriced , an alternative would be to use the value set in user\_search config param to assingn this value , sadly I dont have experience in PHP development, help is welcome ;-) \* Min change in the comment, former value 'external\_ldap' confuued me, so changed it to match the example in app/config/auth.config.php $extldap\_user\_correspondance function \* Fixed typo \* Fix typos and documentation Co-authored-by: Diego Bendlin  Co-authored-by: Yannick Warnier

# Chamilo 1.11.12 - Le Breuil-sous-Argenton, 13/08/2020

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.12 is a minor bugfix release on top of 1.11.10.

Starting from this release, changes are registered by reversed date of addition (the latest changes first), which dramatically improves the changelog edition time. Because yes, it is reviewed manually.

### Release name

[Le Breuil-sous-Argenton](https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Le_Breuil-sous-Argenton) is a very small
village in the Deux-Sèvres department, in the region of Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France,
with a population of about 500 people. A very quite village, it is host to the
[Château de l'Ébaupinay](https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ch%C3%A2teau_de_l%27%C3%89baupinay),
a late-gothic castle from the end of the Middle Age, purchased in 2019 (and to be restored)
through a crowd-funding campaign, dipping its overall history in a big mix of weird events.

Correspondingly, Chamilo 1.11.12 is a solid but minor version of Chamilo, which comes (much later than
initially planned) at the end of a long series of 1.\* versions.

According to plans, it should not
even have existed, and yet here you have it, with an incredible number of quality features you're very
likely to appreciate, like many others. Instead of not existing at all, it is likely to be one of
our most successful versions yet, delivered to our community and owned by them as per our license,
a bit like a crowdfunding project.

This version should be a stepping stone before version 2.0,
already well in the works but still months away at the time of releasing this version.


### Security fixes

Several vulnerabilities have been reported to us (see [our security page](https://support.chamilo.org/projects/1/wiki/Security_issues)) and swiflty fixed. Thanks to all white hat hackers for helping us out (see their nicknames on the page).


- \[2020-05-06\] ( [5e3ec9fd](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/5e3ec9fd57467624da3b2b114ab110cecf6de6e8)) Security: Add Database::escape\_string
- \[2020-04-24\] ( [aced30ea](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/aced30eaed1cb491c44aec1c37d5b3fc1c28f434)) Security: Escape fields in template.
- \[2020-04-24\] ( [bf50545e](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/bf50545e848805c9f123e6736eeba2edd7327bbc)) Security: Add form->protect() to validate token when submitting a form. Function called in user\_edit.php
- \[2020-01-16\] ( [eef75d02](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/eef75d02a4ab6452fdf20dbaa3f491c2108611b0)) Security: Update ezyang/htmlpurifier
- \[2019-11-21\] ( [20d64a61](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/20d64a61b71ecac2913d9ae655a25ee6d0ccc12a) \- [BT#16311](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/16311)) Security: Fix api\_replace\_dangerous\_char, do not remove specific words.
- \[2019-09-30\] ( [0c3b06fc](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/0c3b06fcc251a70fc44ac0f91b3bec78fb5240a3) \- [BT#15259](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/15259)) Security: Fix double escape\_string, remove Security::remove\_XSS()

### Possibly breaking changes

- Changes in the e-mail libraries might generate issues if you have variable values in $platform\_email\['SMTP\_FROM\_EMAIL'\] and/or $platform\_email\['SMTP\_FROM\_NAME'\] in app/config/mail.conf.php. [More info...](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/6b8c9e22be49470cc64efa51135457683c8df7d6)

- \[2019-07-08\] ( [db60bd5a](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/db60bd5a4b9b3f6191959676e4e120850bda2a3d) \- [BT#15694](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/15694)) Webservice: Add gradebook webservice

### Removals

- None

### Known issues

- Due to the end of life of the version of Doctrine ORM we use, a warning about a "continue" instead of a break in "UnitOfWork.php" line 2640 will appear on most pages if you don't disable Warning messages. You can also remove it by just editing the line and replacing "continue;" by "break;", safely. However, because this is in an official dependency of Chamilo, we cannot change it for you. The problem itself is not really a problem. PHP understands it, it just warns you because this type of syntax should be avoided. Nothing to worry about.

# Chamilo 1.11.10 - Winchester, 08/05/2019

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.10 is a minor bugfix release on top of 1.11.8. Contrary to previous releases, this one has a large number of security fixes. We strongly recommend you update to this version as soon as you can. Most notable in this version are 2 new features in the survey tool.

Starting from this release, changes are registered by reversed date of addition (the latest changes first), which dramatically improves the changelog edition time. Because yes, it is reviewed manually.

### Release name

[Winchester](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Winchester) is a small city of Hampshire, England,
with a population of about 45,000 people and the famous cathedral of Winchester. Its very long history dates
back to prehistoric time, and was an Iron Age oppidum (celtic settlement) before being overrun by the
Belgae (Gaulish tribe later known as Belgians) and this continued during and after the Roman conquest of
Britain, when it was given protective stone walls.

It later remained a notable city throughout the West Saxon kingdom rule and is currently a midly famous
English tourism location.

Links to this release of Chamilo are multi-facetted: this version cements features
of the 1.11 major version for years to come, its links to Belgium are important (main development area), it
has, to date, a bit more than 45,000 registered installations, and choosing an English town seemed fitting
at a time where the separation between the UK and the rest of Europe is all over the press.

Version 1.11.10 is also more secure, as it comes with a dozen security fixes.

### Security fixes

- \[2019-02-26\] ( [c245b033](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/c245b03308f8274b93f2a39e5435d5e9e4b6aecf)) Security: Use "clean\_up\_files\_in\_zip" function before extracting content Blocks php/htaccess files
- \[2019-02-26\] ( [53c0dc4a](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/53c0dc4a9fba27644905c19c80ee19fb9d6ff390)) Security: Remove folder main/inc/lib/nanogong after composer update
- \[2019-02-26\] ( [2164d36f](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/2164d36f0b0f61f342dff08d7ef977634e05e876)) Security: Remove nanogong files (deprecated).
- \[2019-02-22\] ( [1c82459f](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/1c82459f142e67636b9241cef1d46b2b927547dd)) Security: Protect lp\_upload.php to avoid malicious uploads by unauthenticated users #security
- \[2019-02-22\] ( [e4637751](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/e46377515fb33eb573c4bfcbcee173aac60c1393)) Security: Avoid showing user popup to non authenticated users if user is not a course teacher #security
- \[2019-01-25\] ( [48126729](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/481267293eba109ae329ff201565577fcf5b2202)) Security: Block anon users
- \[2019-01-18\] ( [662dbd62](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/662dbd6255e4bf5294ca0572d3f322609a1ee3f9)) Security fixes, add int casting

- \[2019-01-16\] ( [33e2692a](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/33e2692a37b5b6340cf5bec1a84e541460983c03)) Security: Fix XSS in social network and one extended access to tickets

- \[2018-12-20\] ( [54d05c11](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/54d05c11b97b20e5286b9cb5ce9e9670a96d3c64)) Security: Fix suspected XSS/SQL injections vulnerabilities in tickets
- \[2018-12-17\] ( [ae7f2d5b](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/ae7f2d5bd215b049cdd731742e660e43e826d003) \- [GH#2757](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/2757)) Remove XSS

- \[2018-12-03\] ( [5e61c2b0](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/5e61c2b0fcc938ca687b8d4e593b1500aa52a034) \- [GH#2746](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/2746)) Remove XSS from social groups page

### Possibly breaking changes

- \[2018-12-12\] ( [a681bf55](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/a681bf55eac1742d1e4fca865f52679286b745b8)) [GH#2708](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/2708) Remove duplicate from limit\_session\_admin\_role configuration setting

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

- \[2019-05-07\] ( [94b7ca55](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/94b7ca55b6648fdb01136c13d0d0334ef9b344d7) \- [BT#15579](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/15579)) Exercise: Add "Unanswered" status for unique questions, showing on the quiz results page

### Web services

- None

### Removals

- We have removed the possibility to start WebRTC videoconference sessions in the global chat as the library used suffer security vulnerabilities and was not maintained. We have not, at this time, found any equivalent JS library that would fit our needs and the strict GPLv3 licensing terms.
- Some chart legends do not show in UTF-8 languages like Arabic due to the library we use for those charts.

### Known issues

- None

# Chamilo 1.11.8 - Sayaxché, 15/08/2018

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.8 is a minor, bug fix and security fix release on top of 1.11.6 that contains a series of
small new features, including first support for European RGPD. Given the security fixes it contains,
we highly recommend you to update from previous versions as soon as possible.

### Release name

[Sayaxché](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sayaxch%C3%A9) is a small municipality in the Guatemalan
jungle of El Petén. It is a notable point that requires taking a small ferry to cross the La Pasión river
and get from the ancient ruins of Tikal to the modern capital city of Guatemala. This represents the jump we
are hoping to make after 1.11.8 to get out of the 1.11 versions and into our restructured version 2.0.


### Security fixes

- \[2018-07-24\] ( [385a84ef](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/385a84efe62a1910700465c1748e4036dc43bf18)) Security: Add app/Resources/public/css to the list of directories where execution of PHP is forbidden
- \[2018-07-24\] ( [b0041b62](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/b0041b6250b3fdbe5a939c549e8d0ce69dd686e1)) Security: Add documentation about X-Frame-Options in configuration.dist.php
- \[2018-07-23\] ( [4ffe5edb](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/0de84700648f098c1fbf6b807dee28ec640efe62) \- [#2532](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/2532)) Security: Add Security::remove\_XSS to clean variables from $\_REQUEST
- \[2018-07-23\] ( [d5129ad7](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/d5129ad7ede4d8f21b039689559c77616cf8a891)) Security: Update PHP files extension matching pattern in .htaccess and documentation to match all possible forms supported by PHP 5 and PHP 7.
- \[2018-07-23\] ( [1c27a8b4](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/1c27a8b42aa4df5fb870d1303488bc35ab91bd95)) Security: add rules to .htaccess to prevent direct PHP execution from the corresponding directories and updates security.html with a missing change in the previous commit. Using security.html is still the recommended way to go for security, but in the absence of that, we want to make sure Chamilo is always more secure.
- \[2018-07-23\] ( [6ff87c3a](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/6ff87c3ae6106e32eb3dd76b78c952acccbd1529)) Security: Add Nginx rules to security documentation, in order to prevent execution of PHP files from the uploadable-files directories
- \[2018-05-31\] ( [d400657b](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/d400657bfa7ca08ca7a26abb73f607244cc48e73)) Security: Fix who is online access: now it will check chamilo settings api\_get\_setting('showonline', 'world') api\_get\_setting('showonline', 'users') api\_get\_setting('showonline', 'course')
- \[2018-05-29\] ( [0de84700](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/0de84700648f098c1fbf6b807dee28ec640efe62) \- [GH#2532](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/2532)) Security: Use json\_decode/json\_encode instead base64 - Add Security::remove\_XSSS
- \[2018-05-09\] ( [d6971923](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/d69719233ce93e5590c77653436b6bdc8ab66aac)) Security: Check access to "who is online in session"
- \[2018-04-09\] ( [00f3e4a6](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/00f3e4a6506035674a58ccdf4ebe098bd6f607e3)) Security: Fix work access for teachers and students

### Possibly breaking changes

- \[2018-07-27\] ( [6750c5f5](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/6750c5f582038458378194ca0d14992441c942c5) \- [BT#14687](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/14687)) Gradebook: Rename disable\_gradebook\_stats to gradebook\_enable\_best\_score and fix behaviour: now the setting will be required to \*enable\* the 3 last columns of the gradebook results table (avg, best score and ranking)
- \[2018-07-27\] ( [4d67dfb6](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/4d67dfb66a3e489ef12fa4db7eef3c3f5e89367a) \- [BT#14687](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/14687)) Gradebook: Avoid conflict between gradebook\_detailed\_admin\_view and disable\_gradebook\_stats

This setting imports that folder, e.g. course/ABC/scorm/my\_scorm is saved in the new location course/DESTINATION/scorm/my\_scorm/
- \[2018-05-09\] ( [247e1a04](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/247e1a04f1886e5c7c71b1d743350bd7b066b9dd) \- [BT#14252](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/14252)) Admin: Add configuration setting 'my\_courses\_session\_order'. Userportal session list - Show end date null values at the end. If setting "my\_courses\_session\_order" is set to: $\_configuration\['my\_courses\_session\_order'\] = \['field' => 'end\_date', 'order' => 'asc'\]; Null values will be shown at the end.
- \[2018-05-08\] ( [409ca7ad](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/409ca7ad2c143213ab419ad79099b4e6290f2ec1) \- [BT#14196](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/14196)) Admin: Add configuration setting session\_courses\_read\_only\_mode (was lock\_course\_in\_session)
- \[2018-05-08\] ( [caad4bbb](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/caad4bbb94b5643f273b949e7d4911dedad1a440) \- [BT#14113](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/14113)) Admin: Security: Add configuration setting 'disable\_token\_in\_new\_message' to avoid issues when sending messages for very active users with several open tabs. This introduces a security vulnerability as it can allow some third party to send DOS attacks through the PHP sending script, but might be necessary to reduce user anxiety
- \[2018-04-25\] ( [ac7665e5](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/ac7665e531d883f64ee8d4509fe101991ea3e399) \- [BT#14254](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/14254)) Admin: Add "Hide from catalog" (hide\_from\_catalog) course extra field in order to hide courses from the course catalog. Refactor course/session/course category code. Change function name and move functions to CourseAndSessionsCatalog
- \[2018-04-25\] ( [90ea4936](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/90ea4936eb1e5161cdcac14f6dd39beb62af57e9) \- [BT#14251](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/14251)) Admin: Add configuration setting "allow\_exercise\_auto\_launch" to allow auto launch for documents and exercises - requires DB change
- \[2018-04-23\] ( [4cecc047](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/4cecc047adbdaa16f8e997205113806112a9b5e1) \- [BT#14192](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/14192)) Admin: Tracking: Add url(portal)/session/user stats

### Known issues

# Chamilo 1.11.6 - Poznán, 18/01/2018

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.6 is a minor, bugfix release on top of 1.11.4.

### Release name

[Poznán](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pozna%C5%84) is a city on the Warta river in west-central Poland. It is best known for its renaissance Old Town and Ostrów Tumski Cathedral. Poznań is among the oldest and largest cities in Poland. It has often topped rankings as a city with very high quality of education and a very high standard of living. Giving the stability this 8th anniversary version 1.11.6 has achieved and its high benefits to education, we believe Poznán is a fitting name for us.

### Security fixes

- \[2017-09-27\] ( [4ffe5edb](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/4ffe5edb442d27943c0a52bd2078c64aa2328c80) \- [BT#13285](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/13285)) Security: Remove excessive SQL quotes filtering adding risk to queries

### Possibly breaking changes

### Notable new Features

.


#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

- \[2018-01-17\] ( [49ba4f6d](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/49ba4f6d7b9888928e19a19b331d37925d86c351)) Plugin: Test2PDF: Add test2pdf plugin to convert exercises to PDF. This plugin can be further cleaned up but works as is.

### Known issues

- ( [a285f485](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/a285f48555774f1ef2df4df4b9b27c32187b07c0) \- [GH#1956](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/1956)) Document: Text-to-speech feature is broken due to the services providers not allowing the service for free anymore. See configuration.dist.php for the API key to use Google Translate. Pediaphon will be removed.
- Several issues have been reported migrating from 1.9 to 1.11.4. Some have been fixed in 1.11.6, but did not have the capacity (in terms of human resources) to review the migration process in-depth. Please make sure you undertake any critical production-environment migration with a specialist. Try Chamilo Official Providers, for example.

# Chamilo 1.11.4 - Uyuni, 31/05/2017

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.4 is a minor, bugfix release of the 1.11.x branch, with a large number of bugfixes on top of 1.11.2.

### Release name

[Uyuni](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uyuni "Wikipedia page for Uyuni, Bolivia") is a small city that serves as a tourist gateway to the bare Uyuni salt flat. We wanted to use the name to transmit the idea that we are cleaning up (or laying down) the plans to move from all-timer version 1 of Chamilo to version 2. As such, this version eliminates as many issues as we can possibly eliminate and contains as much clean-up as we can do before jumping to version 2.0. Maybe this will not be the last of the 1.\* releases, but it is certainly one of the latest steps before we eventually get there.

### Security fixes

There are 2 security fixes in this version, so we urge you to upgrade to this version as soon as possible


- One [fix for unsanitized user input](https://support.chamilo.org/projects/chamilo-18/wiki/Security_issues#Issue-21-2016-07-15-Moderate-risk-User-Input-Sanitation), present in Chamilo through the inclusion of an older version of the PHPMailer library
- One [more important fix for a PHP file upload flaw](https://support.chamilo.org/projects/chamilo-18/wiki/Security_issues#Issue-23-2017-02-09-Moderate-risk-PHP-File-Upload) that happens in the social network, for registered users only

### Possibly breaking changes

- Dropped support for PHP 5.4 and inferior (now REQUIRES PHP 5.5 or more)
- As Chamilo becomes more popular, we are facing new security-based challenges that come as consequences of the simplicity
that we offer our users. As such, in this version of Chamilo, the administrator \*must\* enable a configuration setting as follows
in order **to authorize teachers and students to use iframes** (embedding things from outside) inside the online text areas in their courses and personal spaces.
To enable those, edit the app/config/configuration.php file and paste the following just after the last setting:


```
$_configuration['course_introduction_html_strict_filtering'] = false;
```

### Stylesheets and theming

A series of changes have been applied to the main/template/default/ folder in this version, so if you use your own template, make sure you update it to use the latest displays (otherwise some pages might fail and show TWIG-related error messages). Most notably:

- A change has been made to include image2\_chamilo in the ckeditor plugins in default/layout/header.js.tpl. If you have a custom version of this file, please search for the image2\_chamilo text in the default TPL and make sure you apply the change, otherwise CKeditor might not display anymore.
- ( [7c4f0d64](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/7c4f0d6453fb422009facc404db664e3e525fa3c)) Add margin to all Bootstrap tabs
- ( [b53b86fb](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/b53b86fbeaeb773b8877af14119b888acc8750d6)) Remove jquery-ui tabs from Stylesheets Settings
- ( [e85abd8d](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/e85abd8dbc99d2a876e432e697147264ac325a00) \- [BT#12665](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/12665)) Add template pdf\_general\_thematic.tpl
- ( [d975e2e6](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/d975e2e6b9672ae34e1c82878d93a387d248a591)) Add career dashboard.tpl
- ( [b3f626cd](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/b3f626cd9bc8432d2040583412341618650e345f) \- [GH#1868](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/1868)) Remove duplicated twig filters

### Web services

- ( [3b6816b9](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/3b6816b9c6f2d178e764ea92420d064827bd15be)) Web services: REST: Fix course forum in API v2
- ( [e7f42250](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/e7f422509acc5d40c4a9241588ebb61bed6d4b0c) \- [GH#1503](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/1503)) Web services: REST: Fix agenda events in API v2

### Removals

- We have removed the automated tests generated years ago in PHPUnit and SimpleTest. We are now mostly working with Behat and those older tests were not really working anymore.
- main/admin/course\_create\_content.php
- ( [21afa46d](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/21afa46d5960ba812adc35cd0b1a49f0b9d8853d)) Remove unused file main/admin/course\_create\_content.php
- ( [6d0f05e2](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/6d0f05e2ac3a6be9945eb3853d2ebf4c559db590)) Remove old file 404.php
- ( [1905984c](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/1905984c0875445539efe51769cd6c5e8bfa98f2) \- [GH#1493](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/1493)) Remove cache folder cleanup script: Clean up can be made with chash or composer
- ( [9c718032](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/9c718032db45b8df28e31bd6604faefa6829c96c) \- [GH#1604](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/1604)) Remove header\_extra\_content from head.tpl that causes display it twice - Issue #1604
- ( [658dce04](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/658dce049de9450a588fd44de4a517e0149f3404)) Remove unused function getCustomWebIconPath()
- ( [9b6ab69c](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/9b6ab69c71647716f4329e296764a93482b0baef) \- [GH#1554](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/1554)) Remove references to nonexistent chatCall\* properties
- ( [f9aaea89](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f9aaea89eb4d79fa3eefc45a5e5825bcb08d40ae) \- [BT#12052](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/12052)) Optimization: Remove useless ttl check when using APCu
- ( [260ee40e](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/260ee40e5c12243bafdd30e9014fb8440cf48623) \- [BT#12052](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/12052)) Optimization: Remove apcu\_clear\_cache() call which was resetting the whole cache everytime the online users count was refreshed
- ( [41640a2f](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/41640a2faa8ad317d97568e2a2f6243ee8a15493)) Remove function get\_access\_settings: api\_get\_course\_info gives the same result.
- ( [caca50ed](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/caca50ed403705c3e8771f9bb5ff4e88a927b10b)) Remove unused file lp\_list\_search.css
- ( [267940d0](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/267940d0911c2034d66a8db66a70c2cb9a3f43b5)) Remove unused session ascii\_math\_loaded
- ( [d8b988f1](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/d8b988f13103907e4d8320b6cfedfda5818d44f1)) Removing `check_parameter` and `check_parameter_or_fail` functions from `CourseManager`
- ( [e23d0a50](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/e23d0a50f736b649bb3d189d3fb71f5ef23030eb)) Removed unused main/exercise/feedback.php file.
- ( [f2ff57db](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f2ff57db641c2791dede96bd634486d5d7b89a59)) Add deprecated in main/exercise/feedback.php file. Probably not used.

### Known issues

- IMS/QTI import/export still has minor issues
- In Internet Explorer 9, learning paths might not show other pages than the first to be opened. We lacked computers with IE9 at the time of release of 1.10.8. Guaranteeing IE9 support will likely require additional services. See [the corresponding bug report](https://support.chamilo.org/issues/8075)
- The Xapian search module is broken. We hope to fix that soon, but not a lot of people use it, so no real priority is given to this.
- Encoding issues when importing accentuated characters from MS-Office-generated .xlsx files (for example when importing exercises). This isn't really a Chamilo issue, but since some users might have issues with that, we've decided to report it to avoid any surprise.
- The text-to-speech providers are not supporting a free option anymore, making this feature non-functional - see [#1956](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/issues/1956)

# Chamilo 1.11.2 - Bari, 01/11/2016

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.2 is a minor, bugfix release of the 1.11.x branch, with a few bugfixes on top of 1.11.0.

### Release name

[Bari](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bari "Wikipedia page for Bari, Italy") is the capital city of the Metropolitan City of Bari and of the Apulia region, on the Adriatic Sea, in Italy. It is just a few hundred kilometers North of Lecce, the city which gave the name to our previous version. A bit more modern and a bit larger, it also hosts the infamous Basilica of Saint Nicholas, known as the "Wonderworker" for its miracles. Given 1.11.2 is just a perfecting release on top of 1.11.0, we felt the name of Bari was well suited for this version.

### Security fixes

None in this version.

### Possibly breaking changes

None in this version.

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins

- ( [f7872b7d](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/f7872b7d42764849c6ce94511adff5f337944f53)) Add configuration setting to decide whether to let registered users access open courses content (if not subscribed to the course) or not
- ( [e826fda7](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/e826fda7e2c37caff757b7ed93d7ab29d975bfa1) \- [BT#11371](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/11371)) Added geolocalization coordinates extra field

None in this version.

### Stylesheets and theming

None in this version.

### Web services

None in this version.

### Removals

None in this version.

### Known issues

- An issue has been reported with the Wiris plugin and a fix has been submitted to Wiris by our team. See [CT#8480](https://support.chamilo.org/issues/8480) if you need the fix
- IMS/QTI import/export has minor issues
- In Internet Explorer 9, learning paths might not show other pages than the first to be opened. We lacked computers with IE9 at the time of release of 1.10.8. Guaranteeing IE9 support will likely require additional services. See [the corresponding bug report](https://support.chamilo.org/issues/8075)
- The Xapian search module is broken. We'll fix that soon, but not a lot of people use it
- Encoding issues when importing accentuated characters from MS-Office-generated .xlsx files (for example when importing exercises). This isn't really a Chamilo issue, but since some users might have issues with that, we've decided to report it to avoid any surprise.

# Chamilo 1.11.0 - Lecce, 17/10/2016

### Release notes - summary

Chamilo 1.11.0 is a major release of the 1.11.x branch. It is meant as a transition between 1.10 and 2.0 versions.

### Release name

[Lecce](http://www.openstreetmap.org/relation/40442#map=11/40.3363/18.2359), Italy, is a charming little city with strong remains of the Roman Empire. By its geographical location, it is at the "edge" of Italy and Western Europe as if, getting to Lecce from there, you were preparing to "jump" to Africa or Greece. We feel like 1.11.0 is the last big step before Chamilo 2.0, and as such we thought that Lecce was a good name to match this situation.

### Security fixes

None in this version.

### Possibly breaking changes

None in this version.

### Notable new Features

#### For end-users, teachers and Chamilo admins (by date)

- ( [a308cb81](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/a308cb81ff467d6017395ef35afcb677e09ff35b)) Add basic Moodle courses import feature
- ( [238763ae](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/238763aece0cdd01a21ff50536ab656292a8ed2d) \- [#8307](https://support.chamilo.org/issues/8307)) Add recalculate students score feature in exercises
- ( [ece817c5](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/ece817c5446067b9184d8c7b23e72a634cbb7d85) \- [#8195](https://support.chamilo.org/issues/8195)) Add Start/End date and validation in forum
- ( [dd051695](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/dd051695d71cb7e69969d6b3644a5b1ee79bedfb)) Add new exercise option allowin to show the correct answers only on the last attempt
- ( [77799c00](https://github.com/chamilo/chamilo-lms/commit/77799c0025684839e1128564e63993b9fe4ae8ec) \- [BT#11438](https://task.beeznest.com/issues/11438)) Add support for IMS/QTIv1.2 import
